nasb.text: That your foot may shatter them in blood, The tongue of your dogs may have its portion from your enemies.”

esv.text: that you may strike your feet in their blood, that the tongues of your dogs may have their portion from the foe.”

cnv.text: 好使你在他們的血中洗自己的腳，使你的狗的舌頭也有分舔仇敵的血。”

ccb.text: 好让你们的脚从他们的血泊中踩过， 你们的狗也可以吃他们的肉。”

csbs.text: 好使你的脚把仇敌击碎在血中， 使你的狗的舌头从中也有份。”
